info.description: Auto-generated from a sanitized glinet-profiler capture of a GL.iNet mt6000 on firmware 4.9.0. Calls are JSON-RPC 2.0 over POST /rpc. The `x-status`, `x-risk`, `x-discovered-by` and `x-gli4py` extensions carry registry metadata. Empirical observation, not an official vendor contract.
info.title: GL.iNet mt6000 RPC API
